folder.name: {{ item().folder_name }}
folder.parent_folder_id: {{ item().parent_folder_id if item().parent_folder_id is defined and item().parent_folder_id else none }}

publish.value: {% set filtered = [c for c in CTX.raw_companies if not c.archived] %}{% if CTX.target_company_name %}{{ [c for c in filtered if c.name == CTX.target_company_name] }}{% else %}{{ filtered }}{% endif %}

{%- set known = [] -%}{%- for item in CTX.company_folders -%}{%- if item is mapping and item.result is defined and item.result.result is defined -%}{%- for folder in item.result.result -%}{%- if folder is mapping and folder.name is defined -%}{%- set _ = known.append(folder) -%}{%- endif -%}{%- endfor -%}{%- endif -%}{%- endfor -%}{{ known }}

nonfunctional_fields.name: [BEZ - PROC] Docs: Seed Default Folders
nonfunctional_fields.notes[0].content:
## How to Add New Folders

Edit the **Data Aliases** on the `define_folder_list` task's transition to add or modify folders.

### Example Configuration:
```json
[
  {"name": "Network Documentation", "description": "Network diagrams, IP schemes, and configurations"},
  {"name": "Security Policies", "description": "Security policies and compliance documentation"},
  {"name": "Onboarding", "description": "New client onboarding documentation"},
  {"name": "Runbooks", "description": "Standard operating procedures and runbooks"}
]
```

### Adding a New Folder:
Simply add a new object to the list with:
- `name` (required): The folder name
- `description` (optional): Folder description

The workflow will automatically skip folders that already exist for each company.
nonfunctional_fields.notes[0].title: 📁 Folder Configuration
nonfunctional_fields.notes[1].content:
## Workflow Flow

1. **Define Folders** - Configure the nested folder structure to deploy
2. **List Companies** - Fetch all companies from Hudu
3. **Filter Active** - Remove archived companies (and filter by target company if specified)
4. **Check Existing** - Get existing folders for each company (with-items)
5. **Flatten & Determine** - Flatten nested hierarchy with depth levels, exclude existing folders
6. **Initialize** - Set current_depth=0, max_depth, and known folders list
7. **Create at Depth** - Create all folders at current depth level (with-items)
8. **Update & Check** - Add newly created folders to known list, increment depth
9. **Loop** - If more depth levels exist, go back to step 7

### Workflow Input
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `target_company_name` | String | No | If provided, only targets this specific Hudu company. Leave empty to target all active companies. |

### Features:
- ✅ Skips archived companies
- ✅ Skips folders that already exist (idempotent)
- ✅ **Supports unlimited nesting depth**
- ✅ Processes folders level-by-level (parents before children)
- ✅ Concurrent API calls (5 at a time per level)
- ✅ Easy to add new folders via nested JSON structure
- ✅ Optional single-company targeting
nonfunctional_fields.notes[1].title: 🔄 Workflow Overview
nonfunctional_fields.parameters.target_company_name.descripti: If provided, only targets this specific Hudu company by exact name. Leave empty to target all active companies.
nonfunctional_fields.parameters.target_company_name.label: Target Company Name
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].description: Create folders at the current depth level
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].next[0].label: On Success
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].description: Define the list of KB folders to deploy. Add new folders by adding objects with 'name' and 'description' keys.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].next[0].label: On Success
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[2].description: Build list of folders to create (excluding ones that already exist)
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[2].next[0].label: On Success
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].description: Filter to only active (non-archived) companies. If target_company_name input is provided, filters to only that company.
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].next[0].label: Has Companies
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[4].description: Initialize processing state: current depth level and known folders
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[4].next[0].label: Has Folders to Create
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[5].description: Get existing folders for this company to check for duplicates
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[5].next[0].label: On Success
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[6].description: Retrieve all active (non-archived) companies from Hudu
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[6].next[0].label: On Success
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[7].description: Update known folders with newly created ones and check if more depth levels need processing
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[7].next[0].label: More Levels
